summary: A single-story rectangular bunker or fortified structure with a dark wood plank roof featuring stepped/tiered design. The main body is constructed from stone brick with a gravel foundation. Four small barred windows are evenly spaced along the front wall. The building sits on a raised dirt platform surrounded by gravel.
rebuild_hints: Build rectangular stone brick walls approximately 10×8 blocks with 3-4 block height
Create tiered/stepped roof using dark wood planks (nether wood or dark oak) with 3-4 ascending layers
Install 4 evenly-spaced small windows (2×2 blocks) with iron bars and glass panes on front wall
Surround base with gravel platform extending 2-3 blocks outward
Add dirt/gravel foundation layer beneath structure
Roof appears to have 2-block overhang on sides based on perspective views
uncertainties: Precise roof block count and arrangement unclear from angles shown
Whether windows have doors or are sealed with bars only
Back and side wall details not fully visible
Material of roof may be dark oak wood or nether wood planks - color suggests darker variant
